items.title: What’s happened is that we went from AI chat tools that were relatively cheap and had sma…
items.title_zh: 发生的事情是，我们放弃了相对便宜且具有小功能的人工智能聊天工具……
items.description: What’s happened is that we went from AI chat tools that were relatively cheap and had small context windows, to AI agents that have giant context windows, the ability to keep track of longer running work, and models that cost an order of m…
items.description_zh: 所发生的情况是，我们从相对便宜且上下文窗口较小的 AI 聊天工具，转变为具有巨大上下文窗口、能够跟踪长时间运行的工作以及成本为 m 的模型的 AI 代理。
